title: achyronia meyeri
intro: Achyronia meyeri, also known as the 'sensitive plant' due to its compound leaves folding up when touched, is a plant species found in tropical regions. The plant has been found to contain medicinal properties, particularly in its root, which has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Achyronia meyeri include reducing inflammation, treating fever, and acting as a diuretic, which can help with urinary issues. Achyronia meyeri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried root extracts for medicinal use.
